notes: Standalone EMI / Loan Payoff Calculator (new 'EMI Calculator' menu item, sidebar + drawer). Schema v12 enriches EMIs with optional outstandingPrincipal + ROI fields, surfaced in both Edit-my-inputs EMI rows and Instruments EMI cards. The calculator: load any of your loans (pre-fills outstanding, rate, EMI) or enter a custom one; live results show payoff months, close date, total interest, total outflow, plus months/interest SAVED versus the baseline EMI. Supports a one-time lump-sum prepayment (with chosen month) and a higher 'new EMI' to test. Full month-by-month amortization schedule (opening/payment/interest/principal/closing), toggle to show/hide. 'Apply to projection' (for a loaded loan) writes tagged lifecycle events — a setAmount from the current month + a close at the computed payoff month (loan ends early, correctly) — so the Projection and Net Worth reflect the plan; 'Restore original' removes only the calculator-applied events, preserving any manual timeline changes. Math verified: 8,90,134 @ 8.25% pays off in 19 months / 60,175 interest at 52k EMI (25 months / 79,294 at the bank's 39,997); +3L lump -> 12 months / 26,426. Reduce-tenure assumption stated; prepayment-penalty and 80C/Sec24 caveats surfaced in the UI.
